from source import pascal

def test_pascal_triangle_row_lengths():
    rows = pascal(3)
    assert len(rows) == 3, f"Expected 3 rows, got {len(rows)}"
    assert len(rows[0]) == 1, f"First row should have length 1, got {len(rows[0])}"
    assert len(rows[1]) == 2, f"Second row should have length 2, got {len(rows[1])}"
    assert len(rows[2]) == 3, f"Third row should have length 3, got {len(rows[2])}"
